name: Ratatosk
description: Sovereign Claude Code replacement. Direct Anthropic API, full tool loop, JSONL sessions, hook execution, MCP client, Grove-wired. Yours to run. Yours to keep.
author: USER

data_streams.description: Session transcripts stored locally. Never sent upstream.

data_streams.purpose: Session start/end events posted to Grove for fleet visibility
data_streams.description: Posted to Grove only when RATATOSK_GROVE_CHANNEL is set.

notes: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY required for cloud mode. RATATOSK_MCP_PATH for MCP wiring (default: willow-1.9/sap/sap_mcp.py). RATATOSK_GROVE_CHANNEL to enable Grove event posting.
